title: Stupid Eva Quiz
wikitext:
[]: Stupid Eva Quiz             Quote Post by Zuggy » Wed Nov 28, 2007 4:38 pm I did a search for the eva quiz that I'm sure was on these forums, but I can't find it... might add some more questions at a later date. For the questions about spoken lines you don't need to be 100% correct but at least be in the ballpark for, as there are different subs out there. Tell us how many you get right! 1. What's the name of the comic that Hyuga is reading in episode 10? 2. What make is Misato's GPS unit in her car? 3. Which of Zeurel's eyes gets a good poking by Eva 01's horn? 4. What is the name of the transport helicopter Shinji, Kensuke, Toji and Misato catch a lift in during episode 8? 5. What fluid is in Rei's intravenous line in the first episode? 6. What is the very first line spoken in episode 5 (dub or sub)? 7. What does it say on Pen Pen's dish? 8. In which episode is the dummyplug first used? 9. What's the room number of Rei's apartment? 10. Which episode is the only episode where we see Shinji wearing a watch? 11. What time in the morning is it when Shinji gives Rei her new security card in episode 5? 12. In the ending credits how many complete rotations does naked upsidedown spinning Rei make? 13. In the first episode how far away is Shinji from Tokyo 3 to begin with? 14. What time is the lunch break in the school Shinji goes to? 15. In which year was Yui born in? 16. Who's soul is inside Eva 00? 17. In the last episode how many birds are seen eating Rei's slice of toast? 18. What time does Asuka phone Ryoji in episode 15? Highlight to read: Answers wrote: 1. WEEKLY 2. Sony 3. Zeurel's right eye. 4. MiG 55D. 5. LCL 6. Begin activation! 7. Pen^2 8. Episode 18. 9. 402 10. Epsiode 1 11. 9:45AM 12. 14 13. 13km 14. 12:35PM 15. 1977 16. If you said Naoko or Rei 1 then you're wrong! :p 17. 2 18. 3:43PM

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Wed Nov 28, 2007 4:49 pm Zugzwang wrote: Tell us how many you get right!

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Nov 28, 2007 5:16 pm i got 4 right

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Nov 28, 2007 5:18 pm I got six right

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Nov 28, 2007 5:26 pm I got three.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Nov 28, 2007 6:33 pm Zero. But the LCL in the IV line seems a little dubious to me.

[]: Re: Stupid Eva Quiz             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Nov 28, 2007 8:06 pm Zugzwang wrote: 3. Which of Zeurel's eyes gets a good poking by Eva 01's horn? Answers wrote: 3. Zeurel's right eye.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Nov 28, 2007 8:53 pm You pass, you fail.

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Wed Nov 28, 2007 9:57 pm I got 4...thank god.

[]: Re: Stupid Eva Quiz             Quote Post by Shiro » Thu Nov 29, 2007 12:37 am 5 right.

[]:             Quote Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Thu Nov 29, 2007 12:42 am 2!! I actually got 2 right!! ;p The one about LCL (;p thought that was a bit obvious. ;p) and the one about Pen^2 :) Because that's in His and Her Circumstances... because there's the dog Pero Pero (I believe that's his name) and his dish says: Pero^2. :) :p

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Thu Nov 29, 2007 5:45 am I got 3: - The transport chopper - Rei's apartment # - The # of birds eating toast What is par for the course?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Thu Nov 29, 2007 11:58 am Have to admit that I wouldn't get any more right than the folks here so far - I had to watch the episodes to come up with the questions >_> UrsusArctos wrote: You're right about the eye, but the name is Ze ru el, not Zeurel. That's something a whole bunch of non-nerds know pretty well.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Thu Nov 29, 2007 2:08 pm this is very intersting: are we...certain, that there was LCL in Rei's I.V.? I will have to check...

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Nov 29, 2007 2:49 pm V wrote: this is very intersting: are we...certain, that there was LCL in Rei's I.V.? I will have to check...

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Thu Nov 29, 2007 8:54 pm BrikHaus wrote: V wrote: this is very intersting: are we...certain, that there was LCL in Rei's I.V.? I will have to check...

[]:             Quote Post by Wevangeliwon » Thu Nov 29, 2007 9:24 pm 2 right! At least I didn't get zero.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Nov 29, 2007 10:11 pm Kyle wrote: Was it an I.V or was it a umm,those things that old people pee in? The tube they put in your pee hole?Damn,what are those things called? I honestly forgot...Mayby they had one hooked up to Rei...

[]:             Quote Post by V » Thu Nov 29, 2007 11:36 pm I wouldn't jump to the conclusion that its LCL if its not quite the right color

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Nov 30, 2007 11:15 am Wasn't there a big ol' thread on this LCL I.V. topic?
